examples: He hoped the dispute could be settled amicably.
"Hullo," replied Peter amicably, though he had quite forgotten them.
Robbers and the robbed drank together, amicably agreeing that the battle was to the strong.
However, the president was at pains to stress that he and Hack had parted ways amicably.
The partnership ended amicably this summer, much to the dismay of the fashion literati.
